_description: The Eternity Elevator (Spacecraft) — exercise all three abilities. Setup: Alice has The Eternity Elevator with 18 charge counters and two untapped Grizzly Bears (2/2). Suggested sequence: (1) Station — tap a Grizzly Bears (power 2) → adds 2 charge counters → now at 20. (2) The 20+ activated ability becomes legal; {T}: Add 20 mana of any one color. Alternatively, before stationing, activate the basic {T}: Add {C}{C}{C} mana ability. Station is sorcery-speed; both mana abilities are mana abilities (no stack).
